test_catalog.description: Test if a password reset token can be used to change another user's password
test_catalog.expected: Token only valid for the email it was sent to
poc_steps: 1. Request reset for userA@example.com
2. Intercept the reset token
3. Attempt to use userA's token on userB@example.com's account
4. Check if userB's password is changed

test_catalog.description: Reset tokens should be invalidated when password is changed
test_catalog.expected: Old reset tokens rejected after password change
poc_steps: 1. Request password reset
2. Change account password (while logged in)
3. Attempt to use the reset token from step 1
4. Token should be rejected

test_catalog.description: Can an attacker update email without password confirmation?
poc_steps: 1. Log in as userA
2. Attempt to change email to userB@example.com
3. Check if password confirmation required
4. Check if email verification sent to NEW email only

test_catalog.description: user+tag@example.com vs user@example.com — same inbox or different accounts?
test_catalog.expected: Backend normalizes plus-addressing OR treats as same account
poc_steps: 1. Register userA@example.com
2. Attempt to register userA+test@example.com
3. Check if separate account created or 'already exists' returned

test_catalog.description: Can reset token be used without prior request?
test_catalog.expected: Token only valid after forgottenPasswordTokens API called
poc_steps: 1. Directly POST to reset endpoint WITHOUT requesting token first
2. Check if token validation is stateful or stateless

test_catalog.description: Different response times for real vs non-existent emails
test_catalog.expected: Identical response times and messages for all emails
poc_steps: 1. Send forgot password for real@example.com — measure time
2. Send forgot password for nonexistent@example.com — measure time
3. Compare response times (difference >100ms = leak)

test_catalog.description: Can user A access user B's resources by manipulating IDs?
test_catalog.expected: 403 Forbidden when accessing another user's resources
poc_steps: 1. Log in as userA, note your user_id
2. Replace user_id with userB's ID in URL
3. If 200 returned with userB's data = IDOR

test_catalog.description: Can a regular user access admin endpoints?
test_catalog.expected: 403 Forbidden for non-admin users on admin routes
poc_steps: 1. Log in as regular user
2. Attempt to access /admin, /dashboard, /manage, etc.
3. Check for 200 (should be 401/403)

test_catalog.description: Access tokens exposed in URL fragments (browser history, logs)
test_catalog.expected: Tokens in POST body or secure cookies, not URL
poc_steps: 1. Initiate OAuth flow
2. Check redirect URI for access_token in URL fragment
3. Check browser history, server logs for token exposure

test_catalog.description: Does the server properly restrict HTTP methods?
test_catalog.expected: Only allowed methods return 200, others return 405
poc_steps: 1. Try GET, POST, PUT, DELETE on protected endpoints
2. Check if authorization enforced on all methods

test_catalog.description: Can A@example.com and a@example.com be registered as separate accounts?
test_catalog.expected: Email normalized to lowercase before lookup
poc_steps: 1. Register A@example.com
2. Attempt to register a@example.com
3. Check if 'already exists' or separate account created

test_catalog.description: Can resource IDs be predicted by iterating numbers?
test_catalog.expected: UUIDs or non-guessable IDs, or proper authorization on all IDs
poc_steps: 1. Access your own resource, note the ID format
2. Try incrementing/decrementing ID by 1
3. Check for 200 responses on other users' resources

test_catalog.test_name: Missing rate limiting on auth endpoints
test_catalog.description: No rate limiting allows unlimited password guesses or token requests
test_catalog.expected: After 5-10 attempts, further requests blocked for 15+ minutes
poc_steps: 1. Send 10+ rapid login attempts
2. Check if account locks, CAPTCHA required, or requests blocked
3. No protection = vulnerability

test_catalog.expected: Min 8 chars, mixed case, numbers, special chars, not in common lists
poc_steps: 1. Attempt to register with password: '123456', 'password', 'admin'
2. Check if weak passwords are accepted

test_catalog.description: Can protected pages be accessed directly without auth check?
test_catalog.expected: All protected pages redirect to login when unauthenticated
poc_steps: 1. Without logging in, try accessing /dashboard, /settings, /profile
2. Check if redirected to login or content accessible

test_catalog.description: Can JWT signature be bypassed by changing algorithm to 'none'?
poc_steps: 1. Take a JWT token
2. Change algorithm from 'RS256' to 'none'
3. Remove signature, change payload to admin
4. Send request with modified token

notes: Initializer ran but no active crawl implemented — add recon + baseline capture
